summary: Marine Liability insurance covering shipowners, charterers, and port operators for third-party liability arising from marine operations. Written on P&I Club rules or standalone market basis. Complex multi-party indemnity structures.

schemaEntities.description: Marine operator entity. Custom: OperatorType, PIClubMembership, FleetTonnage, TradingPattern, CargoCategoriesHandled, PortStateControl_Detentions, ISM_CertStatus, ISPS_Compliance, MLC_Compliance.
79 rules: Port State Control detention history thresholds, ISM/ISPS/MLC certificate validity, P&I vs market basis eligibility, crew liability sublimit checks, cargo pollution trigger rules.

relationships.note: P&I coverage driven by operator compliance certificates and PSC record
PSC detention and certificate rules are underwriting referral triggers

migrationIssues.detail: PSC detention history requires Paris MOU / Tokyo MOU data feed integration. No GW Cloud native integration -- external API required.
Crew and vessel compliance certificates with expiry tracking. GW Cloud document management supports certificate storage but expiry validation rules need migration.
Eligibility determination for P&I Club vs standalone market policy. Custom Gosu logic -- GW Cloud underwriting rules can accommodate with configuration.
Charterer/shipowner liability allocation logic. GW Cloud multi-insured support available -- standard configuration work.

cloudMapping.action: Paris MOU / Tokyo MOU API integration required
Generic certification status field -- ISM-specific rules need migration
Custom extension required -- P&I club directory integration
